title: calophyllum pulcherrimum var. gracile
intro: Calophyllum pulcherrimum var. gracile is a variant of the Calophyllum pulcherrimum species, a type of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Calophyllum pulcherrimum var. gracile include potential uses in wound healing, skin care, and the management of certain infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in topical applications, such as creams, ointments, and salves, to leverage its medicinal properties.
